debug_info.goal:
case pos
x : IGame
p : Player
y : IGame
hy : y ∈ moves p x
z : IGame
hz : z ∈ @IGame.reverseSet x y p
h : @IGame.Reversible x y p
⊢ ¬@IGame.Reversible (@IGame.unreverse x) (@IGame.unreverse z) p

failed_attempts:
rw [reverseSet_of_reversible (x := x) (y := y) (p := p) h] at hz
    intro h'
    cases p with
    | left =>
        rcases h' with ⟨w, hw, hwle⟩
        have hw' : Subposition w x := by
          exact subposition_of_mem_reverseSet (x := x) (y := y) (p := Player.left) (q := Player.left)
            hy (by simpa [reverseSet_of_reversible (x := x) (y := y) (p := Player.left) h] using hw)
        have : w ≤ x := (unreverse_equiv w).ge.trans (hwle.trans (unreverse_equiv x).le)
        exact (lt_irrefl _ ((birthday_lt_of_subposition hw').trans_le this)).elim
    | right =>
        rcases h' with ⟨w, hw, hxlew⟩
        have hw' : Subposition w x := by
          exact subposition_of_mem_reverseSet (x := x) (y := y) (p := Player.right) (q := Player.right)
            hy (by simpa [reverseSet_of_reversible (x := x) (y := y) (p := Player.right) h] using hw)
        have : x ≤ w := (unreverse_equiv x).ge.trans (hxlew.trans (unreverse_equiv w).le)
        exact (lt_irrefl _ ((birthday_lt_of_subposition hw').trans_le this)).elim
  · exact False.elim (h (by
      cases p <;> simpa [reverseSet_of_not_reversible (x := x) (y := y) (p := p) h] using hz))

    have hyzx : z ≤ x := by

          exact (h.choose_le).trans hx

    cases p with

    | right =>
        rcases h' with ⟨w, hw, hxw⟩
        have xw : x ≤ w := hx.trans hxw
        have : ¬ z < w := not_lt_of_le xw
        exact this (lf_right hw)

    simpa using not_reversible_unreverse (x := x) (p := p) (y := unreverse z) this

    have : y ∈ reverseSet x y p := by

    have : unreverse y ∈ (unreverse x).moves p := by

    simpa using not_reversible_unreverse (x := x) (p := p) (y := unreverse y) this

intro h'
    rw [reverseSet_of_reversible (x := x) (y := y) (p := p) h] at hz
    have hxz : IsOption z x := .trans (.of_mem_moves hz) (.of_mem_moves hy)
    have hxuz : unreverse z ≤ unreverse x := (unreverse_equiv z).le.trans (hxz.le.trans (unreverse_equiv x).ge)
    cases p with
    | left =>
        rcases h' with ⟨w, hw, hwle⟩
        have hxw : IsOption w (unreverse z) := .of_mem_moves hw
        have hxuw : unreverse w ≤ unreverse z :=
          (unreverse_equiv w).le.trans (hxw.le.trans (unreverse_equiv z).ge)
        exact (lt_irrefl (unreverse x)) ((hwle.trans hxuw).trans_lt hxz.lt)
    | right =>
        rcases h' with ⟨w, hw, hle⟩
        have hxw : IsOption w (unreverse z) := .of_mem_moves hw
        have hxuw : unreverse z ≤ unreverse w :=
          (unreverse_equiv z).le.trans (hxw.le.trans (unreverse_equiv w).ge)
        exact (lt_irrefl (unreverse x)) ((hxz.lt.trans_le hxuw).trans_le hle)
  · rw [reverseSet_of_not_reversible (x := x) (y := y) (p := p) h] at hz
    subst hz
    exact h

rw [reverseSet_of_reversible h] at hz
    intro h'
    have : Subposition (h'.choose) (unreverse x) := .of_mem_moves (Reversible.choose_mem_moves h')
    have hsub : Subposition (h.choose) x := .trans (.of_mem_moves (Reversible.choose_mem_moves h)) (.of_mem_moves hy)
    cases p with
    | left =>
        have hx : h'.choose ≤ unreverse x := Reversible.choose_le (x := unreverse x) (y := unreverse z) h'
        have hx' : h'.choose ≤ x := hx.trans (unreverse_equiv x).ge
        have hzle : h.choose ≤ x := h.choose_le (x := x) (y := y) h
        exact (Subposition.not_le_of_lt this).2 ((birthday_lt_of_subposition hsub).trans_le (birthday_le_of_le hx'))
    | right =>
        have hx : unreverse x ≤ h'.choose := Reversible.le_choose (x := unreverse x) (y := unreverse z) h'
        have hx' : x ≤ h'.choose := (unreverse_equiv x).le.trans hx
        have hzle : x ≤ h.choose := h.le_choose (x := x) (y := y) h
        exact (Subposition.not_le_of_lt this).1 ((birthday_lt_of_subposition hsub).trans_le (birthday_le_of_le hx'))
  · intro h'
    have : unreverse z ∈ x.unreverse.moves p := by
      simpa [reverseSet_of_not_reversible h] using mem_moves_unreverse_of_not_reversible (x := x) (y := y) (p := p) hy h
    have : z ∈ reverseSet x y p := by
      simpa [reverseSet_of_not_reversible h] using Set.mem_singleton z
    exact h (by
      cases p <;> simpa [reversible_left, reversible_right] using h')

      exact (not_lt_of_subposition hw') (lt_of_lt_of_le (birthday_lt_of_isOption ⟨hw, rfl⟩) (birthday_unreverse_le x))
    · rw [reversible_right] at h'

        exact .trans (.of_mem_moves hw) (.trans (.of_mem_moves h.choose_mem_moves) (.of_mem_moves hy))

        have : w ∈ y.moves right := by

    · rcases h' with ⟨w, hw, hxw⟩
      have : unreverse w ∈ x.unreverse.moves left := by
        refine ?_
        have : w ∈ y.moves left := by

        exact mem_moves_unreverse_of_not_reversible hy h
      exact (not_lt_of_mem_moves_left_undominate (x := x.unreverse) (y := unreverse w) (z := unreverse z) ?_ ?_) ?_

    have : unreverse z ∈ x.unreverse.moves p :=

  · intro hrev
    rw [reverseSet_of_not_reversible (x := x) (y := y) (p := p) h] at hz
    have : z = y := by simpa [Set.mem_singleton_iff] using hz
    subst this
    exact h ((unreverse_equiv x).symm.reversible_of_reversible hrev)

intro hrev
    rw [reverseSet_of_reversible h] at hz
    have hz' : z ∈ h.choose.moves p := hz
    have hm : unreverse z ∈ x.unreverse.moves p :=
      mem_moves_unreverse_of_reversible h hy hz'
    cases p with
    | left =>
        rcases (reversible_left.mp hrev) with ⟨w, hw, hwle⟩
        exact (lf_irrefl (x := unreverse z)) ((lf_of_right_le hwle).trans (left_lf hm))
    | right =>
        rcases (reversible_right.mp hrev) with ⟨w, hw, hlew⟩
        exact (lf_irrefl (x := unreverse z)) ((lf_of_le_left hlew).trans (lf_right hm))
  · rw [reverseSet_of_not_reversible h] at hz
    subst hz
    exact h

have : z ∈ h.choose.moves p := by
      rw [reverseSet_of_reversible (x := x) (y := y) (p := p) h] at hz
      exact hz
    intro hrev
    cases p <;> simp [Reversible, Reversible.choose] at hrev
  · intro hrev
    cases p <;> simp [Reversible, Reversible.choose] at hrev

intro h'
    have : Reversible x y p := h
    have hz' : z ∈ reverseSet x y p := hz
    rw [reverseSet_of_reversible this] at hz'
    have hxz : z ∈ this.choose.moves p := hz'
    have : ¬ Reversible (unreverse x) (unreverse z) p := by
      cases p <;> simpa [Reversible] using h'
    exact this (by
      cases p <;> simpa [Reversible] using h')
  · intro h'
    have : ¬ Reversible (unreverse x) (unreverse z) p := by
      cases p <;> simpa [Reversible] using h'
    exact this (by
      cases p <;> simpa [Reversible] using h')

have hz' : z ∈ h.choose.moves p := by
      simpa [reverseSet_of_reversible h] using hz
    intro hrev
    have hrev' : Reversible (unreverse x) (unreverse z) p := hrev
    rcases p with _ | _
    · rcases hrev' with ⟨w, hw, hwle⟩
      have : w ∈ (unreverse x).moves right := hw
      rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at this
      rcases this with ⟨y', hy', ⟨z', hz', hz''⟩⟩
      subst hz''
      have hy'' : y' ∈ x.moves right := hy'
      have hzsub : Subposition z' x := subposition_of_mem_reverseSet hy'' hz'
      have hwle' : unreverse z' ≤ unreverse x := by
        exact (unreverse_equiv z').2.trans (hwle.trans (unreverse_equiv x).1)
      have : z' ≤ x := by
        exact (unreverse_equiv z').1.trans (hwle'.trans (unreverse_equiv x).2)
      exact (lf_right hy' (this.trans (unreverse_equiv x).2)).not_le (by
        exact (unreverse_equiv y).2.trans (h.choose_le.trans (unreverse_equiv x).1))
    · rcases hrev' with ⟨w, hw, hlew⟩
      have : w ∈ (unreverse x).moves left := hw
      rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at this
      rcases this with ⟨y', hy', ⟨z', hz', hz''⟩⟩
      subst hz''
      have hy'' : y' ∈ x.moves left := hy'
      have hzsub : Subposition z' x := subposition_of_mem_reverseSet hy'' hz'
      have hlew' : unreverse x ≤ unreverse z' := by
        exact (unreverse_equiv x).2.trans (hlew.trans (unreverse_equiv z').1)
      have : x ≤ z' := by
        exact (unreverse_equiv x).1.trans (hlew'.trans (unreverse_equiv z').2)
      exact (left_lf hy' (this.trans (unreverse_equiv x).2)).not_le (by
        exact (unreverse_equiv x).1.trans (h.le_choose.trans (unreverse_equiv y).2))
  · grw [reverseSet_of_not_reversible h] at hz
    subst hz
    intro hrev
    exact h (by
      cases p <;>
        simpa [reversible_left, reversible_right] using hrev)

rw [reverseSet_of_reversible h] at hz
    intro h'
    have : Subposition h'.choose x := by
      refine .trans (.trans (.of_mem_moves ?_) (.of_mem_moves ?_)) (.of_mem_moves hy)
      · exact mem_moves_unreverse_of_reversible h hy hz
      · exact h'.choose_mem_moves
    exact (not_lt_of_subposition this) ((birthday_lt_of_subposition this).trans_le (le_rfl))
  · rw [reverseSet_of_not_reversible h] at hz
    subst hz
    intro h'
    exact h h'

have hz' : z ∈ h.choose.moves p := by
      simpa [reverseSet_of_reversible h] using hz
    intro hrev
    have hch : Reversible x.unreverse (unreverse z) p :=
      (unreverse_equiv x).reversible_congr_left
        ((unreverse_equiv z).reversible_congr_right hrev)
    cases p with
    | left =>
        rcases (reversible_left).1 hch with ⟨w, hw, hwle⟩
        have : w < unreverse y := by
          have : w < unreverse z := left_lf hw
          exact this.trans (lf_of_right_le (unreverse_equiv _).ge hz')
        exact (this.not_le hwle)
    | right =>
        rcases (reversible_right).1 hch with ⟨w, hw, hle⟩
        have : unreverse y < w := by
          have : unreverse z < w := lf_right hw
          exact (lf_of_le_left (unreverse_equiv _).le hz').trans this
        exact (this.not_le hle)
  · simpa [reverseSet_of_not_reversible h] using hz

have : z ∈ h.choose.moves p := by
      rw [reverseSet_of_reversible (x := x) (y := y) (p := p) h] at hz
      exact hz
    intro hrev
    have hmem : hrev.choose ∈ (unreverse z).moves (-p) := hrev.choose_mem_moves
    have hsub : Subposition hrev.choose z :=
      Subposition.of_mem_moves (p := -p) (x := unreverse z) (y := hrev.choose) hmem
    have : ¬ Reversible (unreverse z) (unreverse z) p :=
      not_reversible_unreverse (x := z) (y := unreverse z) (p := p) (by simpa using Set.mem_iUnion_of_mem z (Set.mem_iUnion_of_mem this ⟨_, rfl⟩))
    exact this (by simpa using hrev)
  · intro hrev
    have : unreverse y ∈ x.unreverse.moves p := mem_moves_unreverse_of_not_reversible (x := x) (y := y) (p := p) hy h
    exact hrev.elim

have hz' : z ∈ h.choose.moves p := by
      simpa [reverseSet_of_reversible h] using hz
    have : unreverse z ∈ (unreverse x).moves p :=
      mem_moves_unreverse_of_reversible h hy hz'
    intro hrev
    have : (unreverse z) ∈ reverseSet (unreverse x) (unreverse z) p := by
      by_cases h' : Reversible (unreverse x) (unreverse z) p
      · simpa [reverseSet_of_reversible h']
          using (show (unreverse z) ∈ h'.choose.moves p from h'.choose_mem_moves)
      · simpa [reverseSet_of_not_reversible h']
    have : Subposition (hrev.choose) (unreverse x) :=
      subposition_of_mem_reverseSet (by simpa using this) (by simpa using hrev.choose_mem_moves)
    exact (not_lt_irrefl _ <| (birthday_lt_of_subposition this))
  · have : unreverse y ∈ (unreverse x).moves p :=
      mem_moves_unreverse_of_not_reversible hy h
    intro hrev
    have : (unreverse y) ∈ reverseSet (unreverse x) (unreverse y) p := by
      by_cases h' : Reversible (unreverse x) (unreverse y) p
      · simpa [reverseSet_of_reversible h']
          using (show (unreverse y) ∈ h'.choose.moves p from h'.choose_mem_moves)
      · simpa [reverseSet_of_not_reversible h']
    have : Subposition (hrev.choose) (unreverse x) :=
      subposition_of_mem_reverseSet (by simpa using this) (by simpa using hrev.choose_mem_moves)
    exact (not_lt_irrefl _ <| (birthday_lt_of_subposition this))

simp [reverseSet_of_reversible h] at hz
    cases p <;>
      · intro h'
        rcases h' with ⟨w, hw, hwle⟩
        have hw' : Subposition w x := by
          refine .trans (.trans (.of_mem_moves hw) (.of_mem_moves h.choose_mem_moves)) (.of_mem_moves hy)
        have hwlt : w.birthday < x.birthday := birthday_lt_of_subposition hw'
        have : (unreverse w).birthday < (unreverse x).birthday :=
          (birthday_unreverse_le w).trans_lt ((birthday_unreverse_le x).trans_lt hwlt)
        exact this.not_le (birthday_le_of_le hwle)
  · simp [reverseSet_of_not_reversible h] at hz

have hz' : z ∈ h.choose.moves p := by
      simpa [reverseSet_of_reversible h] using hz
    intro hrev
    cases p <;> simp [Reversible] at hrev
    · rcases hrev with ⟨w, hw, hwle⟩
      have : Subposition w (unreverse x) := .of_mem_moves hw
      have hw' : Subposition w x := (subposition_of_mem_reverseSet (p:=left) hy hz').trans (.of_mem_moves hy)
      have : w ≤ x := (unreverse_equiv w).ge.trans (hwle.trans (unreverse_equiv x).le)
      exact (lf_right (h.choose_mem_moves) ((this).trans_lt (birthday_lt_of_subposition hw')).ne) rfl
    · rcases hrev with ⟨w, hw, hxw⟩
      have : Subposition w (unreverse x) := .of_mem_moves hw
      have hw' : Subposition w x := (subposition_of_mem_reverseSet (p:=right) hy hz').trans (.of_mem_moves hy)
      have : x ≤ w := (unreverse_equiv x).ge.trans (hxw.trans (unreverse_equiv w).le)
      exact (left_lf (h.choose_mem_moves) ((birthday_lt_of_subposition hw').le.trans this).ne) rfl
  · simpa [reverseSet_of_not_reversible h] using h
